title: AN ACT relating to the protection of minors on digital platforms.
subject: Attorney General
Children And Minors
Civil Actions
Communications
Consumer Protection
Data Protection
Effective Dates, Delayed
Information Technology
Internet, Access And Infrastructure
Parental Rights
Short Titles And Popular Names
Technology

Trade Practices And Retailing

abstracts.abstract: Create new sections of KRS Chapter 367 to define terms; prohibit social media platforms from providing minors an addictive feed and sending push notifications to minors between the hours of midnight and 6 a.m. without permission from a parent or legal guardian; require social media platforms to determine a user's age upon account creation and establish guidelines for handling the information; require social media platforms to develop and implement a proactive strategy to prevent a minor from exposure to harmful material; grant enforcement power to the Office of the Attorney General and provide a private right of action to parents and legal guardians; provide that the Act may be cited as the Youth Online Safety Act, include severability clause. EFFECTIVE January 1, 2027.
